name: Juvenon
title: Chief Scientific Officer of Juvenon
longBio:
Dr. Luke R. Bucci, PhD, CNS-S, CCN (Ret.) is the Chief Scientific Officer of Juvenon and a biomedical scientist with more than 40 years of experience in nutrition, dietary supplements, and clinical laboratory science.
He earned his PhD in Biomedical Sciences from the University of Texas Health Science Center at Houston and was among the first Certified Clinical Nutrition Specialists (CNS) and Certified Clinical Nutritionists (CCN), helping establish national competency standards in clinical nutrition certification.
Dr. Bucci has successfully launched and scaled multiple nutrition companies, developed patented products used daily by millions worldwide, and formulated supplements across practitioner, health food, and mass-market channels. His scientific firsts include combining glucosamine with chondroitin, bringing krill oil to the mass market, developing streamlined multivitamin formulas, demonstrating oral hyaluronan absorption into joints and skin, and showing that oral ornithine can stimulate growth hormone release in humans.
A respected authority in joint health, sports nutrition, women’s health, probiotics, omega-3s, adaptogens, hormones, and regulatory science, Dr. Bucci has also authored scientific books and taught university-level courses on dietary supplement regulations.
He is the recipient of the James Lind Scientific Achievement Award and the Supplement Industry Icon for Science & Innovation Award.
shortBio:
Dr. Luke R. Bucci, PhD, CNS-S, CCN (Ret.) is the Chief Scientific Officer of Juvenon and a biomedical scientist with more than 40 years of experience in nutrition, dietary supplements, and clinical laboratory science.

He earned his PhD in Biomedical Sciences from the University of Texas Health Science Center at Houston and was among the first Certified Clinical Nutrition Specialists (CNS) and Certified Clinical Nutritionists (CCN), helping establish national competency standards in clinical nutrition certification.

A respected authority in joint health, sports nutrition, women’s health, probiotics, omega-3s, adaptogens, hormones, and regulatory science, Dr. Bucci has also authored scientific books and taught university-level courses on dietary supplement regulations.

He is the recipient of the James Lind Scientific Achievement Award and the Supplement Industry Icon for Science & Innovation Award.
